name: Flying Injection Virus Game
description: Take control of a high-tech flying injection aircraft armed with powerful injection weapons as you soar through an infinite world filled with deadly viruses. Your mission is to target and eliminate these menacing threats before they spread, using precision and skill to shoot each virus with a lethal dose of cure. With fast-paced gameplay, stunning visuals, and endless challenges, Flying injection offers an adrenaline-fueled adventure that keeps you on the edge of your seat. Upgrade your aircraft, dodge obstacles, and see how long you can survive in this thrilling battle against viral outbreaks. Play and become the hero the world needs!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
